rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR VS. STEPHANIE NAIFEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Deem Docs Admitted In Sam Egall'S Req For Admissions Of Genuineness
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 10, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT SAMUEL SEGALL's Motion To Deem Docs Admitted In Sam Egall's Request For Admissions Of Genuineness GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED as to Requests for Admissions containing admissions and admissions subject to objection; Motion is DENIED as to Requests for Admissions containing objections only. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $75 ($60 filing fee and $15 copying costs). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND CHOY VS. CAROLE ROBERTSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 10, 2013, line 2. Defendants' Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1112. The only document filed pursuant to CRC 3.1112(a) appears to be points and authorities, no Notice of Motion or Motion compliant with CRC 3.1112(d) was filed. Additionally, no proof of service by actual server was provided. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNE REINHART VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Responses And Further Responses To Disco Requests
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 10, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA's Motion To Compel Responses And Further Responses To Discovery Requests ORDERED to appear at 9:00 a.m. and engage in meet-and-confer efforts. Parties are to report to the Court at 9:30 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOWONNA BUTLER et al VS. EDGAR GARCIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 10, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT EDGAR GARCIA and JANE CREAGER's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Defendants failed to shift burden and show by clear and convincing evidence that moving defendants while being legal title owners are not beneficial owners of the property. Even if burden was shifted, a triable issue of fact exists re: property ownership as mortgage and insurance payments, which are moving defendants' legal obligations, are being paid by co-defendants. Additionally, it is undisputed that current occupants of the premises are not related to moving defendants and former occupant Heather McDonald was not related to any defendant. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRADFORD DUNCAN et al VS. PARKLYN BAY COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Seek Leave From The Court To File First Amended X-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 10, 2013, line 10. CROSS COMPLAINANT PARKLYN BAY COMPANY LLC's Motion To Seek Leave From The Court To File First Amended X-Complaint GRANTED. First Amended Cross-Complaint shall be filed forthwith and served no later than July 19, 2013. If timely responses to First Amended Cross Complaint are not filed Parklyn Bay Company shall request a default without delay. Motion to continue trial should be brought in Department 206. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HESTER MICHAEL VS. LILY NG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 10, 2013, line 6. PLAINTIFF HESTER MICHAEL's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. Incorporation by reference of 13 into each cause of action and prayer for special economic loss damages in unspecified amount renders the complaint uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHEUK TIN YAN VS. LOMBARD FLATS LLC et al

rulings.Case Title: CHEUK TIN YAN VS. LOMBARD FLATS LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Dismissal By Pltf
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 10, 2013, line 11. DEFENDANT MARTIN ENG's Motion To Set Aside Dismissal By Plaintiff DENIED. Moving party fails to show standing. = (501/REQ)
